stories.title: U.S. troops injured in attack on Saudi base as the war reaches one month
stories.summary: Iranian forces hit a Saudi air base housing US troops, wounding several American service members as the month-old Iran war escalates beyond direct US-Israeli strikes.

stories.title: Hundreds of organised protests show resilience of Iranian regime, experts say
stories.summary: Iran's regime organized over 850 pro-government rallies since the war began while arresting at least 1,400 people — classic authoritarian playbook of manufactured support plus repression.

stories.title: One month into Iran war, some Trump objectives are unfulfilled as he looks to wind down the conflict
stories.summary: Trump is looking to wind down the Iran war after a month of fighting that hasn't achieved his initial objectives — turns out regime change is harder than campaign rallies.

stories.title: Israel says it intercepted first incoming missile from Yemen as war in Middle East intensifies
stories.summary: Israel intercepted its first missile from Yemen since the Iran war started, marking the Houthis' entry into the expanding regional conflict.

stories.title: Trump claims Iran wants to ‘make a deal’
stories.summary: Trump claims Iran wants to "make a deal" — the same guy who tore up the last Iran deal now thinks bombing them will bring them to the table.

stories.title: Yemen’s Houthis launch first attack on Israel since outbreak of conflict, as Rubio says war to end in ‘weeks’
stories.summary: Yemen's Houthis fired ballistic missiles at Israeli military sites while Secretary Rubio promised the war will end in "weeks" — we'll see about that timeline.

stories.title: Gulf countries warn of rising threat from Iran-backed militias and proxies
stories.summary: Gulf states are warning that Iran may activate sleeper cells across the Middle East as the conflict widens beyond direct military strikes.

stories.title: Uproar in Bahrain after detainee dies in police custody
stories.summary: A 32-year-old detained for opposing the Iran war died in Bahraini police custody, adding domestic repression to the regional chaos.

stories.title: UAE targeted with missiles and drones – as it happened
stories.summary: UAE was targeted with missiles and drones while India slashed fuel taxes to cushion consumers from war-driven energy price spikes.

stories.title: Intense bombing in Tehran, Isfahan
stories.summary: US-Israeli airstrikes hit Tehran and Isfahan early morning, sending black smoke over both Iranian cities as the bombing campaign continues.

stories.title: Iran war live: US-Israeli war on Iran widens with first attack from Yemen
stories.summary: Iranian Red Crescent reports over 92,600 civilian buildings damaged in US-Israeli strikes as Yemen joins the expanding war.

stories.title: Rescue workers rush to save lives after south Tehran missile strike
stories.summary: Rescue workers are digging survivors and bodies from a building hit by missiles in south Tehran — the human cost of Trump's "precision" campaign.
